description: Quoted array expansion test cases - ${arr[@]} vs ${arr[*]} behavior

tests.name: quoted_array_at_expands_to_separate_words
tests.script: arr=(hello world); for x in "${arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_array_star_expands_to_single_word
tests.script: arr=(hello world); for x in "${arr[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_array_at_with_spaces_in_elements
tests.script: arr=('hello world' 'foo bar'); for x in "${arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_array_star_with_spaces_in_elements
tests.script: arr=('hello world' 'foo bar'); for x in "${arr[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_array_at_empty_array
tests.script: arr=(); for x in "${arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done; echo done

tests.name: quoted_array_star_empty_array
tests.script: arr=(); for x in "${arr[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done; echo done

tests.name: quoted_array_star_custom_ifs
tests.script: IFS=':'; arr=(a b c); for x in "${arr[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_array_at_custom_ifs_unchanged
tests.script: IFS=':'; arr=(a b c); for x in "${arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_assoc_at_expands_to_separate_words
tests.script: declare -A assoc; assoc[a]=hello; assoc[b]=world; for x in "${assoc[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_assoc_star_expands_to_single_word
tests.script: declare -A assoc; assoc[a]=hello; assoc[b]=world; for x in "${assoc[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_assoc_at_with_spaces_in_values
tests.script: declare -A assoc; assoc[a]='hello world'; assoc[b]='foo bar'; for x in "${assoc[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_array_keys_at_expands_to_separate_words
tests.script: arr=(zero one two); for x in "${!arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_array_keys_star_expands_to_single_word
tests.script: arr=(zero one two); for x in "${!arr[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_assoc_keys_at_expands_to_separate_words
tests.script: declare -A assoc; assoc[foo]=1; assoc[bar]=2; for x in "${!assoc[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: quoted_assoc_keys_star_expands_to_single_word
tests.script: declare -A assoc; assoc[foo]=1; assoc[bar]=2; for x in "${!assoc[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: unquoted_array_at_splits_by_ifs
tests.script: arr=('a b' c); for x in ${arr[@]}; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: unquoted_array_star_splits_by_ifs
tests.script: arr=('a b' c); for x in ${arr[*]}; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: single_element_array_quoted_at
tests.script: arr=('hello world'); for x in "${arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: single_element_array_quoted_star
tests.script: arr=('hello world'); for x in "${arr[*]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: array_with_special_chars_quoted_at
tests.script: arr=('a*b' 'c?d'); for x in "${arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done

tests.name: array_with_newlines_quoted_at
tests.script:
arr=$'line1
line2'; for x in "${arr[@]}"; do echo ">$x<"; done
